components.name: string - component name
components.type: string - one of: microservice, database, queue, load_balancer, gateway, cache, external_service, storage, monitoring, cdn
components.technology: string - identified technology (e.g. PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Kong)

connections.protocol: string - REST, gRPC, WebSocket, AMQP, TCP, etc.

risks.severity: string - critical, high, medium, or low
risks.category: string - scalability, security, reliability, or maintainability
risks.title: string - short risk title
risks.recommendation: string - how to mitigate this risk
